Success Stories

Restaurants that run smarter with Foaps

Real results from real restaurants. See how Foaps helps operators save time, reduce errors, and grow their delivery revenue.

  • Haji Ali

    Kerala

    "Foaps has completely transformed how we manage our orders. We no longer miss any orders from Swiggy or Zomato. Everything is in one place and it's super easy to use."

    Geethu

    Operations Manager

  • Mallus Dhaba

    Kerala

    "Managing orders from multiple platforms was a nightmare before Foaps. Now we handle everything from a single screen. Our efficiency has gone up significantly."

    Sathar

    Owner

  • Ceylone Bake House

    Kerala

    "The menu management feature is a game changer. I update once and it reflects everywhere. Saved us so much time every day."

    Razeen

    Owner

  • Empire Plaza

    Kerala

    "With Foaps we can see all our orders at a glance. The reports help us understand which dishes and platforms perform best for us."

    Empire Plaza Team

    Management

  • Pankayam

    Kerala

    "Simple, effective, and saves us time every single day. Foaps is an essential tool for any restaurant doing food delivery."

    Pankayam Team

    Management
